text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where
Umamusume train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I heard Japanese summer camps have pillow
fights at night! Is that true?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Back-breakin' training during the day, then pillow
fights when the sun goes down. Japanese camps
sure are wild...
choice_data_list: (I don't think it's a hard rule...)

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But that won't be a problem for me! See, I'm
gonna be the first ever sprinter to become
Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll kill it in my training and my pillow fights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So begins a thrilling summer camp with Taiki
Shuttle!
